items.title: Jointly Improving Dialect Identification and ASR in Indian Languages using Multimodal Feature Fusion
items.abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) and Dialect Identification (DID) are crucial for Indian languages, many of which are low-resource and exhibit significant dialectal differences. Existing methods often optimize ASR or DID individually, resulting in performance trade-offs. In this work, we propose a multimodal framework that jointly improves ASR and DID. Our method employs a Bottleneck Encoder to extract dialectal features from Conformer-based speech representations and a RoBERTa encoder to process ASR-generated CTC embeddings. A gating mechanism merges these features, followed by an attention encoder to refine the representations. The learned embeddings are concatenated with Conformer outputs to enhance ASR features. Evaluated on eight Indian languages with thirty-three dialects, our method achieves an average DID accuracy of 81.63% and average CER and WER of 4.65% and 17.73%, respectively. These results highlight the effectiveness of our method for joint ASR-DID modeling.
items.llm_evidence_en: jointly improves ASR and dialect identification using multimodal feature fusion
items.llm_evidence_cn: 通过多模态特征融合联合提升语音识别和方言识别
items.llm_evidence: 通过多模态特征融合联合提升语音识别和方言识别
items.canonical_evidence: 通过多模态特征融合联合提升语音识别和方言识别
items.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a multimodal framework that jointly improves ASR and dialect identification for low-resource Indian languages by fusing Conformer speech features with RoBERTa text features via a gating mechanism, achieving better performance on both tasks.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对低资源印度语言中ASR与方言识别任务独立训练导致的性能权衡问题，提出一种多模态特征融合框架。利用Bottleneck编码器提取Conformer语音特征中的方言信息，同时通过RoBERTa编码器处理CTC嵌入，经门控机制融合后由注意力编码器精炼，增强ASR特征。实验表明，该方法在多个方言上同时提升了识别准确率与方言分类精度。
items.llm_tldr: 本文针对低资源印度语言中ASR与方言识别任务独立训练导致的性能权衡问题，提出一种多模态特征融合框架。利用Bottleneck编码器提取Conformer语音特征中的方言信息，同时通过RoBERTa编码器处理CTC嵌入，经门控机制融合后由注意力编码器精炼，增强ASR特征。实验表明，该方法在多个方言上同时提升了识别准确率与方言分类精度。
items.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

items.title: Escaping the Procrustean Bed: Groupwise Orthogonal Connectors for Audio-Language Models
items.abstract: Audio-language models compress a speech encoder's output through a Querying Transformer (Q-Former) connector before feeding it to a large language model. We identify two failures in this compression. The connector's output vectors collapse to a single direction, and different speakers produce nearly indistinguishable outputs, with paralinguistic cues such as speaker identity, gender, and prosody lost along the way. Our method, ORCA, reverses this collapse by splitting the queries into groups whose outputs are constrained to point in different directions. On SAKURA multi-hop reasoning, ORCA gains 26.4 points over an identically trained 4B baseline, reaching 75.2% (vs. 49.0% for the 8B Audio Flamingo-3). At the connector level, the same change cuts query redundancy by 12x and raises cross-speaker variance by 75x.
items.llm_evidence_en: Groupwise orthogonal connectors prevent representation collapse in audio-language models, advancing training methodology.
items.llm_evidence_cn: 分组正交连接器防止表示坍缩，提升音频语言模型训练方法
items.llm_evidence: 分组正交连接器防止表示坍缩，提升音频语言模型训练方法
items.canonical_evidence: 分组正交连接器防止表示坍缩，提升音频语言模型训练方法
items.llm_tldr_en: ORCA fixes representation collapse in Q-Former connectors of audio-language models by using groupwise orthogonal constraints, preserving paralinguistic cues and boosting reasoning.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 针对音频语言模型中连接器输出向量坍缩、丢失副语言信息的问题，提出ORCA方法，通过将查询分组并约束正交性来逆转坍缩。在SAKURA多跳推理任务上，ORCA比同规模基线提升26.4个百分点，证明正交约束能有效保留说话人信息，为大型语音模型的多模态训练提供了更稳定的表示学习技术。
items.llm_tldr: 针对音频语言模型中连接器输出向量坍缩、丢失副语言信息的问题，提出ORCA方法，通过将查询分组并约束正交性来逆转坍缩。在SAKURA多跳推理任务上，ORCA比同规模基线提升26.4个百分点，证明正交约束能有效保留说话人信息，为大型语音模型的多模态训练提供了更稳定的表示学习技术。
